form.formComment: Recent efforts haven't been up to his best. Last start was well back in the run when 6th (Fr8) over 1730m at Bathurst was 8th-13.2 at the bell, beaten 13 m by Lucky Punt (2:04.50) in NR up to 47 on April 1 at $6.50. The run before was well beaten after breaking at Young on March 24. No surprise if he turned things around.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Broke stride as the start was affected.

form.formComment: Last start 7th (Fr2) over 1730m after showing early pace at Bathurst, beaten 50 m by Memphis Fury (2:06.70) in NR 46 to 48 on March 27 at $6. At the start before 8th (Fr1) over 1730m at Bathurst was 5th-8.36 at the bell, beaten 6 m by Daniboy (2:04.20) in NR up to 60 on March 18 at $41. This looks a nice assignment so watch for a better run.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Gave ground over the concluding stages to be beaten 47m.
Held up for clear racing room in the run to the finish and not fully tested.

form.formComment: Last start was well beaten into sixth behind Riverina Flash at Parkes over 1660m in a NR 43 to 47 on April 4 at $5.50. Raced better the start before that with a good run despite getting well back, when 3rd (Fr6) over 1730m at Bathurst, beaten 11 m by Memphis Fury (2:06.70) in NR 46 to 48 on March 27 at $10. Likely to feature.

Likely to feature.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Inconvenienced shortly after the start when Ronzel Sonny broke gait.
Checked at the 1300m when The Handsome One broke stride and veered in.

form.formComment: Solid performance when a close third after a quick start, behind Excuse To Cullect at Young over 1720m in a NR 45 to 47 on March 24 at $9.50. Then a handy effort when beaten by 5 m finishing second behind Riverina Flash at Parkes over 1660m in a NR 43 to 47 on April 4 at $5.50. Great chance to score an overdue win.

Then a handy effort when beaten by 5 m finishing second behind Riverina Flash at Parkes over 1660m in a NR 43 to 47 on April 4 at $5.50. Great chance to score an overdue win.

form.formComment: Didn't do much at the last run, 5th (Sr3) over 1660m at Parkes beaten 14 m by Riverina Flash (2:01.60) in NR 43 to 47 on April 4 at $51. Before that 6th (Sr1) over 1720m at Young was 8th-21.7 at the bell, beaten 12 m by Excuse To Cullect (2:04.70) in NR 45 to 47 on March 24 at $81. Has the job ahead.

form.formComment: Comes here second-up after only six days break. Lacklustre first-up performance when 7th (Sr3) over 2040m at Parkes, beaten 60 m by Krista Bellita (2:33.20) in 2 WINs on April 4 at $34. Not keen.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Tired over the concluding stages to be beaten 62m.
Tired over the concluding stages of the race.
Broke during the score up. Broke clear of interference approaching the 1900m.

form.formComment: Didn't do much at the last run, 8th (Fr6) over 1660m after racing wide at Parkes, beaten 22 m by Memphis Fury (2:02.20) in NR up to 52 on April 4 at $19. Before that broke in score up and was out of position at the start 8th (Fr3) over 2260m at Bathurst beaten 35 m by Time To Torque (2:47.10) in NR up to 58 on March 27 at $51. May do better.

form.formComment: Last start 6th (Sr2) over 1660m at Parkes beaten 30 m by Foresight (1:59.30) in NR up to 52 on April 4 at $5. At the run before game effort when 2nd (Fr1) over 1720m at Young was 2nd-4.8 at the bell, beaten a head by Shes Got A Reason (2:02.70) in NR up to 52 on March 24 at $2.15. Rates highly and can measure up.

form.formComment: Failed to impress last start; 7th (Fr3) over 1660m after showing early pace at Parkes, beaten 35 m by Foresight (1:59.30) in NR up to 52 on April 4 at $19. Showed ability the race before when he won by a head (Sr3) at this track (2:05.80) beating Rockin Sweet in NR 40 to 45 on March 15 at $8.50 at the bell was 8th-14.4. In the mix on the form from two back.
